name: Heartland Spirits
description: Craft distillery and tasting room on Williamson Street in Madison, WI. Tours, monthly cocktail classes, barrel tastings, and release events.

name: American Craft Spirits Association - Midwest
description: Regional programming for independent craft distillers across the Upper Midwest: symposia, roundtables, and chapter meetups.

name: KAAN Madison Chapter
description: Korean American adoptee community gatherings, panels, and family programming in the Madison area.

name: Horribly Hilly Hundreds
description: Annual challenge ride through the steep Driftless-edge hills around Blue Mound State Park, Wisconsin.
